sections.title: C: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36. **MOST**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36. **UP**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36. **BOTTOM**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36. **OUT**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36.

Nina began the school club before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36. **UP**
The school club ...... before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36.

Oscar began the revision session before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36. **BUILD**
The revision session ...... before the lesson on Units 34, 35 and 36.
